# @json-express/queue-memory — AI Context

In-process task queue for development: immediate or delayed one-shot jobs, no external services. (No cron — install queue-bullmq for repeatable jobs.)

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/queue-memory
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import or register it.**

## Configuration (.env)
No keys.

## What it unlocks
- `ctx.queue.enqueue(queueName, jobName, payload, { delay? })` inside model hooks and custom endpoints — offload slow work (emails, webhooks) out of the request path.
- Plugins register workers for named queues; job failures are logged, never crash the server.
- Swap to `queue-bullmq` in production — same `ctx.queue` surface.
